vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:claude-opus-4.8
vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF: show the rain warning as visible text with a timeframe ('Rain possible within ~Xhrs') on its own line under the temperature

plan.title: Rain warning text line with timeframe

narratives.Overview: Builds on the weather badge (PR #18/#19) on the ride screen. Today rain is conveyed only by a small cloud icon with a non-specific accessibility label ('within 6 hours'). Riders glancing at the screen have no visible, time-bound rain cue.
narratives.Problem: The rain warning is icon-only and carries no timeframe, so it is easy to miss and gives no sense of urgency. A rider needs to know rain is coming AND roughly how soon to decide whether to keep riding.
narratives.Goals:
1. Replace the icon-only cue with visible text 'Rain possible within ~Xhrs'.
2. Derive X from the actual hours until the first qualifying rainy hourly bucket.
3. Place the rain cue on its own line directly under the temperature.
narratives.FunctionalRequirements:
FR-1: When rain is expected within the forecast window, the badge MUST show visible text reading 'Rain possible within ~Xhrs', where X is the number of hours until rain.
FR-2: X MUST be derived from the index of the first hourly bucket that meets the existing probability/amount thresholds (1-based: the current hour counts as ~1hr).
FR-3: The rain cue MUST render on a new line beneath the temperature row, not inline with the temperature.
FR-4: When no rain is expected within the window, no rain line is shown.
narratives.Architecture: Replace WeatherSnapshot.rainExpectedSoon (Bool) with rainExpectedInHours (Int?), where nil means no rain in the window. Add a computed rainExpectedSoon (rainExpectedInHours != nil) for back-compat and a rainText display string. OpenMeteoMapper computes the 1-based index of the first hourly bucket meeting the probability or amount threshold. WeatherBadgeView becomes a VStack: temperature row on top, rain text line below.
narratives.TestingStrategy: Unit-test OpenMeteoMapper: first qualifying bucket by probability and by amount yields the correct 1-based hour; no qualifying bucket yields nil; thresholds at boundaries still apply. Unit-test WeatherSnapshot.rainText formatting (singular vs plural, nil when no rain) and rainExpectedSoon derivation. Layout is validated by build + on-device review.

items.title: Compute hours-to-rain in the mapper + snapshot model

narrative.Acceptance: WeatherSnapshot carries rainExpectedInHours (Int?, 1-based, nil when none); OpenMeteoMapper sets it from the first qualifying hourly bucket; rainExpectedSoon remains available as a derived value.

items.title: Render rain text line under the temperature

narrative.Acceptance: WeatherBadgeView shows 'Rain possible within ~Xhrs' on its own line beneath the temperature when rain is expected, and shows nothing rain-related otherwise.

items.title: Unit tests for hours-to-rain and rainText

narrative.Acceptance: Tests cover first-qualifying-bucket selection (probability and amount), nil when no rain, and rainText formatting including pluralization.
